<td width="40%"><font style="FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Smaller&#160;reporting&#160;company</font></td>
<td width="10%"><font style="FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: wingdings">x</font></font></td>
</tr></table>
</div>

<div><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Indicate&#160;by&#160;check&#160;mark&#160;whether&#160;the&#160;&#160;registrant&#160;is&#160;a&#160;shell&#160;company&#160;(as&#160;defined&#160;in </font></font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Rule&#160;12b-2&#160;of&#160;the&#160;Act).&#160;Yes&#160;<font style="DISPLAY: inline;" face="Wingdings">o </font>No&#160;<font style="DISPLAY: inline;" face="Wingdings">x</font></font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">
<div style="TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt" align="justify">&#160;</div>

<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">The aggregate marker value of the voting and non-voting common equity held by non-affiliates computed by reference to the price at which the common equity was last sold, or the average bid and asked price of such common equity, as of the last business day of the Registrant's second fiscal quarter (June 30, 2011) was approximately $2,344,588.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline"><br>
</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">On&#160;April 10, 2012, 9,795,217,291 shares&#160;of&#160;the </font><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Registrant's </font><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">common&#160;stock&#160;were </font></font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">outstanding.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-INDENT: 162pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 27pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt" align="left"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">CAUTIONARY<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;&#160;</font>STATEMENT</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">This Form 10-K contains "forward-looking statements". Some of the statements contained in this Form 10-K for SavWatt USA, Inc., formerly known as Ludvik Capital, Inc. ("Company"), discuss future expectations, contain projections of results of operation or financial condition or state other "forward-looking" information. These statements are subject to known and unknown risks, uncertainties, and other factors that could cause the actual results to differ materially from those contemplated&#160; by the&#160; statements. The&#160; forward-looking information is based on various factors and is derived using numerous assumptions.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Management expresses its expectations, beliefs and projections in good faith and&#160; believes the expectations reflected in these forward-looking statements are based on reasonable assumptions; however, Management cannot assure current stockholders or prospective stockholders that these expectations, eliefs and&#160; projections will prove to be correct. Such forward-looking statements reflect the current views of Management with respect to the Company and anticipated future events.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Management cautions current stockholders and&#160; prospective stockholders that such forward-looking statements, including, without limitation, those relating to the Company's future business prospects, demand for its products, revenues, capital needs, expenses, development and operation costs, wherever they occur in this Form 10-K, as well as in the documents incorporated by reference herein, are not guarantees of future&#160; performance or results, but are simply estimates reflecting the best judgment of Management and involve a number of risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from those suggested by such forward-looking statements.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Important<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>factors<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>that<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>may<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>cause<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>actual<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>results<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>differ<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>from<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>projections </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">include,&#160;for&#160;example:</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>success<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>or<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>failure<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>management's<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>efforts<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>implement<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>their </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">business<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>strategy;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>ability<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Company<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>raise<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>sufficient<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>capital<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>meet </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">operating<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>requirements;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>uncertainty<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>consumer<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>demand<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>for<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>our<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>products,<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>services<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>and </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">technologies;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>ability<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Company<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>protect<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>its<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>intellectual<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>property </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">rights;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>ability<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Company<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>compete<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>with<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>major&#160;established </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">companies;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>effect<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>changing<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>economic<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>conditions;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>ability<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Company<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>attract<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>retain<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>quality<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>employees;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>current<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>global<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>recession<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>financial<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>uncertainty;<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>and</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;other<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>risks<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>which<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>may<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>be<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>described<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>in<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>future<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>filings<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>with<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>SEC.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Words such as "anticipates," "expects," "intends," "plans," "believes," "seeks," "estimates," and variations of such words and similar expressions are intended to identify such forward-looking statements. Therefore, actual results and outcomes may differ materially from what is expressed or forecasted in any such forward-looking statements. Unless required by law, the Company undertakes no obligation to update publicly any forward-looking statements, whether as a result of new information, future events or otherwise.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">FOREWORD</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; Company&#160; was&#160; incorporated&#160; on&#160; October&#160; 20, 2006, under the&#160; name&#160; of Ludvik Capital,&#160; Inc. We changed&#160; our name to SavWatt&#160; USA, Inc. on April 5, 2010. On January 12, 2007, we filed a Form 10 registration&#160; statement under section 12(g) of the&#160; Securities&#160; Exchange&#160; Act of 1934,&#160; as amended&#160; ("Exchange&#160; Act").&#160; As a consequence of filing our Form 10, we became&#160; subject to the periodic&#160; reporting requirements&#160; of the&#160; Exchange Act and were&#160; required to file Annual&#160; Reports on Form 10-K,&#160; Quarterly&#160; Reports on Form 10-Q,&#160; Current Reports on Form 8-K, Proxy Statements&#160; pursuant to Regulation 14A and Schedule 14C&#160; Information&#160; Statements pursuant to the Exchange Act.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><br>
&#160;</font></div>

<div id="HDR">

</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">PART<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;&#160;</font>I</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">ITEM&#160;1.&#160;BUSINESS.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">HISTORY</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">SavWatt&#160; USA,&#160; Inc.&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; ("Company")&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; was&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; incorporated&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; in&#160; the&#160; State&#160; of&#160; Delaware under the name of "Ludvik&#160; Capital,&#160; Inc." on&#160; October&#160; 20,&#160; 2006.&#160; Our name was changed to SavWatt USA, Inc. on April 5, 2010. The Company was originally formed for the purpose of becoming a successor and survivor&#160; corporation by merger with Patriot&#160; Advisors,&#160;&#160; Inc.&#160; and&#160; Templar&#160; Corporation&#160;&#160; pursuant&#160; to&#160; a&#160; plan&#160; of reorganization&#160; and merger&#160; approved&#160; by the&#160; United&#160; States&#160; Bankruptcy&#160; Court, District of Maine,&#160; Case No. 04-20328.&#160; The Company's prior business plan was to make investments in public and private companies by providing long-term debt and equity investment capital to fund the growth, acquisitions and recapitalizations of small and&#160; middle-market&#160; companies&#160; in a variety&#160; of&#160; industries,&#160; primarily located&#160; in the&#160; Untied&#160; States.&#160; The prior&#160; management of Ludvik Captial was not successful in carrying out its business plan<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">Overview of Our Industry and&#160;&#160;Markets We Serve</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">Emitting&#160; more&#160; light&#160; per&#160; watt&#160; than&#160; incandescent&#160; bulbs&#160; and&#160; capable&#160; to&#160; lasting up to 100,000 hours, LED lights are revolutionizing&#160; the lighting industry.&#160; LED lights&#160; contain no harmful&#160; ultraviolet&#160; rays, do not flicker,&#160; or contain toxic substances. Additionally, by using LED lighting, energy consumption can decrease up to 80%. SavWatt USA, Inc (also referred to as "the Company")&#160; distributes LED technology through a network of independent distributors.&#160; Operating nationwide, the&#160; Company&#160; has created&#160; partnerships&#160; with&#160; manufacturers&#160; to secure the best selection of LED street&#160; lights,&#160; tubes,&#160; spot,&#160; and&#160; floodlights.&#160; SavWatt supplies commercial businesses and retailers,&#160; as well as municipalities and state governments, with warranty-guaranteed lighting technology. The Company works closely with each of&#160;client find the best solution to its lighting needs.<br>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">In&#160; the&#160; past&#160; year,&#160; the&#160; market&#160; for&#160; LED&#160; technology&#160; in&#160; the&#160; United&#160; States&#160; has grown from $7 billion to $10.7 billion.&#160; This tremendous growth is reflective of inherent&#160; benefits of LED&#160; technology:&#160; a longer&#160; product&#160; lifetime&#160; and greatly improved&#160; energy&#160; efficiency.&#160; To spur&#160; adoption of energy&#160; efficient&#160; products, federal&#160; law&#160; mandates&#160; that all&#160; light&#160; bulbs are 30% more&#160; efficient&#160; by 2012. Federal tax deductions of up to $.60 per square foot are additionally&#160; available if a lighting&#160; system reduces power usage by 25 to 40% of the standard&#160; lighting power values specified by AHSRAE standard 90.1-2001. By the end of 2012, the LED market in the United States is expected to be valued at $20.4 billion.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; lighting&#160; industry&#160; is&#160; intensely&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; competitive&#160; and&#160; many&#160; of&#160; our&#160; competitors are&#160; large,&#160; well&#160; funded&#160; companies&#160; that&#160; have&#160; substantially&#160; larger&#160; staffs, manufacturing and distribution&#160; facilities and financial&#160; resources than we have at the&#160; present&#160; time.&#160; In the&#160; LED&#160; market,&#160; we&#160; compete&#160; with&#160; companies&#160; that manufacture&#160; or sell&#160; nitride-based&#160; LED&#160; chips as well as those&#160; that&#160; sell LED components.&#160; Competitors&#160; are&#160; offering&#160; new blue,&#160; green&#160; and&#160; white&#160; LEDs with aggressive prices and improved performance. These competitors may reduce average sales prices faster than we are able to reduce costs,&#160; and&#160; competitive&#160; pricing pressures may accelerate the rate of decline of our average sales prices.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; Company&#160; will&#160; compete&#160; with&#160; major&#160; lighting&#160; manufacturers, including General&#160; Electric, Philips, and&#160; Sylvania. Although&#160; these&#160; companies&#160; have established&#160; reputations in&#160; the&#160; marketplace,&#160; each&#160; lacks&#160; the&#160; mobility&#160; and creativity&#160; to meet the new market&#160; demand&#160; for LED&#160; lighting&#160; in a&#160; competitive manner. SavWatt additionally faces competition from smaller U.S.-based lighting companies, but a majority of these lack the branding or marketing expertise that the Company possesses.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div id="PGBRK" style="TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">
<div id="FTR">
<div id="GLFTR" style="WIDTH: 100%" align="left"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 8pt">&#160; </font></div>
</div>

<div id="PN" style="PAGE-BREAK-AFTER: always; WIDTH: 100%">
<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; WIDTH: 100%"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">4</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: center; WIDTH: 100%">
<hr style="COLOR: black" noshade size="2">
</div>
</div>

<div id="HDR">
<div id="GLHDR" style="WIDTH: 100%" align="right"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 8pt">&#160; </font></div>
</div>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">PRODUCTION:</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">SavWatt&#160; will&#160; be&#160; sourcing&#160; LED&#160; products and parts from&#160; factories&#160; in&#160; the&#160; Far East and&#160; US Partners. These factories&#160; assemble&#160; LED bulbs,&#160; fixtures&#160; and&#160; apparatuses&#160; based on&#160; SavWatt's specifications&#160; and bill of material&#160; requirements.&#160; UL or ETL certification for these&#160; products and factories are&#160; supervised&#160; by SavWatt&#160; technicians.&#160; SavWatt opened an office in Shenzhen,&#160; China to supervise production schedules,&#160; shipment arrangements,&#160; samples and quality control inspections. All factories contracted by&#160; SavWatt&#160; will go&#160; through a quality&#160; control&#160; and&#160; performance&#160; test&#160; before becoming&#160; a master&#160; supplier&#160; for&#160; SavWatt&#160; products.&#160; An&#160; agreement&#160; which each supplier will protect the SavWatt&#160; brand,&#160; intellectual property and proprietary information to extent that is enforceable in China.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">During 2012, the Company will increase its focus on the solar markets. In addition to the Company&#8217;s EcoPole it will be selling solar panel solutions through its SavWatt Depot and Savwatt EPC.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">SavWatt EPC specializes in offering all types of photovoltaic solutions adapted to the client&#8217;s individual needs. In simpler terms: we transform solar radiation into electricity, and deliver an end product investment to our client with a guaranteed future and profitability. The integral undertaking of these projects involves the engineering service, the actual installation of modules and the complete installation, maintenance and, where appropriate, a financing study. Our work not only integrates products and services, we also provide added value for our clients so that they entrust us with their investment with total security: cutting-edge technology, advanced technical qualifications, experience and internationalization. </font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">In<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>addition,<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>Company<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>will<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>begin<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>assembling<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>certain<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>LED<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>tubes<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>in<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>its<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>new </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Baltimore&#160;Facility&#160;in&#160;the&#160;3rd&#160;quarter&#160;of&#160;2012. </font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Our<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>fiscal<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>year<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>end<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>is<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>December<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>31.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">HOW&#160;TO&#160;CONTACT&#160;US</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Company's<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>principal<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>executive<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>offices<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>are<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>located<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>at<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;</font>1100<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;</font>Wicomico </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Street,&#160;&#160;Suite&#160;700,</font><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman">&#160;&#160;&#160;</font><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">Baltimore,&#160;&#160;Maryland&#160;21224.&#160;&#160;Our&#160;telephone&#160;&#160;number&#160;is&#160;(646) </font></font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">545-6870.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">EFFECT&#160;OF&#160;EXISTING&#160;OR&#160;PROBABLE&#160;GOVERNMENTAL&#160;REGULATIONS</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">We purchase our products from overseas sources. As a result, our international&#160; sales and purchases are subject to numerous U.S. and foreign laws and&#160; regulations,&#160;&#160; including,&#160; without&#160; limitation,&#160; tariffs,&#160; trade&#160; barriers, regulations relating to import-export control, technology transfer restrictions, the International&#160; Traffic in Arms Regulation&#160; promulgated under the Arms Export Control Act, the Foreign Corrupt&#160; Practices Act and the anti-boycott&#160; provisions of the U.S. Export&#160; Administration Act. If we fail to comply with these laws and regulations,&#160;&#160; we&#160; could&#160; be&#160; liable&#160; for&#160; administrative,&#160;&#160; civil&#160; or&#160; criminal liabilities,&#160; and in the extreme&#160; case,&#160; we could be suspended or debarred&#160; from government&#160; contracts or our export&#160; privileges could be suspended,&#160; which could have a material adverse effect on our business.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">International sales and purchases are also subject&#160; to&#160; a&#160; variety&#160; of other risks, including risks arising from currency fluctuations, collection issues and taxes. Our international&#160; sales are subject to variability as our selling prices become less competitive in countries with currencies that are declining in value against the U.S.&#160; Dollar and more&#160; competitive in countries with currencies that are increasing in value against the U.S. Dollar. In addition, our international purchases&#160; can become more&#160; expensive&#160; if the U.S.&#160; Dollar&#160; weakens&#160; against the foreign&#160; currencies in which we are billed. We have not entered into any foreign currency derivative&#160; financial&#160; instruments; however, we may choose to do so in the future in an effort to manage or hedge our foreign exchange rate risk.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; Company's common stock is registered&#160; pursuant&#160; to&#160; Section&#160; 12(g)&#160; of&#160; the Securities&#160; Exchange Act of 1934, as amended&#160; ("Exchange&#160; Act").&#160; As a result of such registration, the Company is subject to Regulation 14A of the Exchange Act, which regulates proxy&#160; solicitations.&#160; Section 14(a) requires all companies with securities registered pursuant to Section 12(g) thereof to comply with the rules and regulations of the Commission regarding proxy solicitations,&#160; as outlined in Regulation 14A. Matters submitted to stockholders of the Company at a special or annual meeting thereof or pursuant to a written consent will require the Company to provide its&#160; stockholders&#160; with the information&#160; outlined in Schedules 14A or 14C of Regulation 14;&#160; preliminary&#160; copies of this information must be submitted to the Commission at least 10 days prior to the date that&#160; definitive&#160; copies of this information are forwarded to stockholders.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The Company is&#160; also&#160; required to&#160; file annual reports on&#160; Form&#160; 10-K&#160; and quarterly&#160; reports on Form 10-Q with the Commission on a regular basis, and will be required to disclose&#160; certain&#160; events in a timely&#160; manner, (e.g.&#160; changes in corporate control; acquisitions or dispositions of a significant amount of assets other than in the ordinary course of business; and&#160; bankruptcy) in a Current Report on Form 8-K.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">WE ARE&#160; SUBJECT TO THE REQUIREMENTS OF SECTION 404 OF&#160; THE SARBANES-OXLEY CT. IF WE ARE UNABLE TO TIMELY COMPLY WITH SECTION 404 OR IF THE COSTS RELATED TO COMPLIANCE ARE SIGNIFICANT, OUR PROFITABILITY, STOCK PRICE AND RESULTS OF OPERATIONS AND FINANCIAL CONDITION COULD BE MATERIALLY ADVERSELY AFFECTED.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; Company&#160; is&#160; required&#160; to&#160; comply&#160; with&#160; the&#160; provisions&#160; of&#160; Section&#160; 404&#160; of&#160; the Sarbanes-Oxley&#160; Act of&#160; 2002,&#160; which&#160; requires&#160; that we&#160; document&#160; and&#160; test our internal&#160; controls&#160; and&#160; certify&#160; that we are&#160; responsible&#160; for&#160; maintaining&#160; an adequate&#160; system of internal&#160; control&#160; procedures for the 2011 fiscal year. This section also requires that our&#160; independent&#160; registered&#160; public&#160; accounting firm opine on those internal controls and management's&#160; assessment of those controls. We are currently&#160; evaluating our existing controls against the standards adopted by the Committee of Sponsoring&#160; Organizations of the Treadway Commission (COSO). During the course of our ongoing&#160; evaluation and integration&#160; of the&#160; internal controls of our business,&#160; we may identify areas requiring&#160; improvement,&#160; and we may have to design enhanced&#160; processes and controls to address issues identified through this review (see Item 9A, below for a discussion&#160; our internal&#160; controls and procedures).</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">We&#160; believe that&#160; the out-of-pocket costs, the diversion of management's attention from running the day-to-day&#160; operations and operational changes caused by the need to comply with the requirement of Section 404 of the&#160; Sarbanes-Oxley Act could be significant.&#160; If the time and costs associated with such compliance exceed&#160; our&#160; current&#160; expectations,&#160; our&#160; results of&#160; operations&#160; and the future Exchange Act filings of our Company could be materially adversely affected.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Aside&#160; from required compliance with federal and&#160; state securities laws, regulations and rules, and federal, state and local tax laws,&#160; regulations and rules, the Company is not aware of any other&#160; governmental&#160; regulations&#160; now in existence&#160; or that may arise in the future that would have a material&#160; effect on the business of the Company.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">INTELLECTUAL&#160;PROPERTY&#160;RIGHTS</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The&#160; Company presently&#160; has filed for four trademarks. The&#160; Company intends&#160; to seek&#160; copyright&#160; and&#160; trademark&#160; protection&#160; of its trade&#160; names and products. The Company's success and ability to compete are dependent to a degree on the Company's&#160; name and product&#160; recognition.&#160; Accordingly,&#160; the Company will primarily&#160; rely on&#160; copyright,&#160; trade&#160; secret and&#160; trademark&#160; law to protect its product and brand names of our&#160; products or the name(s)&#160; under which the Company conducts its business.&#160; Effective trademark&#160; protection may not be available for the Company's trademarks.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The Company's competitors or&#160; others&#160; may&#160; adopt product&#160; or&#160; service&#160; names similar to the Company's,&#160; thereby impeding the Company's ability to build brand identity and possibly leading to customer confusion.&#160; The Company's inability to adequately&#160; protect its product,&#160; brand, trade names and trademarks would have a material&#160; adverse&#160; effect on the&#160; Company's&#160; business,&#160; financial&#160; condition and operating results.&#160; Despite any precautions the Company takes, a third party may be able to copy or otherwise&#160; obtain and use the&#160; Company's&#160; technology or other proprietary&#160; information without&#160; authorization or to develop similar technology independently.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Policing unauthorized use&#160; of&#160; the&#160; Company's products&#160; is&#160; made especially difficult by the global nature of the Internet and the difficulty in controlling the&#160; ultimate&#160; destination&#160; or security&#160; of products or other data. The laws of other countries may afford the Company little or no effective protection for the Company's intellectual property.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">EMPLOYEES</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">We currently have 20 full-time employees.&#160; We believe that our relations&#160; with our employees are good. Our employees are not&#160; represented by a union or covered by a collective bargaining agreement.<br>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">REPORTS&#160;TO&#160;SECURITY&#160;HOLDERS</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">The&#160; public&#160; may&#160; view&#160; and&#160; obtain&#160; copies&#160; of&#160; the&#160; Company's reports, as filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission, at the SEC's Public Reference Room at 100 F Street,&#160; NE, Room 1580, Washington,&#160; D.C.&#160; 20549.&#160; Information&#160; on the Public&#160; Reference&#160; Room is&#160; available&#160; by&#160; calling&#160; the&#160; SEC at&#160; 1-800-SEC-0330. Additionally,&#160; copies of the Company's reports are available and can be accessed and downloaded via the internet on&#160; the&#160;&#160; SEC's internet&#160;&#160; site at http://www.sec.gov.<br>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">ITEM&#160;1A.&#160;RISK&#160;FACTORS</font><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Investing in the Company, involves&#160; a&#160; number&#160; of&#160; significant risks relating to our business and investment objective. As a result, there can be no assurance that we will achieve our investment objective.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">BUSINESS&#160;RISKS</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">Business risks are risks that are associated with general business conditions, the economy, and the operations of the Company. Business risks are not&#160; risks&#160; associated&#160; with our&#160; specific&#160; investments&#160; or an&#160; offering&#160; of our securities.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">OUR RESULTS OF OPERATIONS, FINANCIAL CONDITION AND BUSINESS COULD BE HARMED IF WE WERE UNABLE TO BALANCE CUSTOMER DEMAND AND CAPACITY.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline"><br>
</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">As customer demand&#160; for&#160; our&#160; products changes, the Company&#160; must&#160; be&#160; able&#160; to ramp up or adjust our&#160; production&#160; capacity to meet demand.&#160; We are&#160; continually taking steps to address our manufacturing capacity needs for our products. If we are not able to&#160; increase&#160; our&#160; capacity&#160; or if we&#160; increase&#160; our&#160; capacity&#160; too quickly, our business and results of operations could be adversely impacted.&#160; If we experience&#160; delays or unforeseen costs associated with adjusting our capacity levels, we may not be able to achieve our financial targets.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">OUR BUSINESS&#160; MAY BE ADVERSELY&#160; AFFECTED BY THE GLOBAL&#160; ECONOMIC&#160; DOWNTURN,&#160; THE CONTINUING&#160; UNCERTAINTIES IN THE FINANCIAL MARKETS AND OUR, OR OUR USTOMERS' OR SUPPLIERS' ABILITY TO ACCESS THE CAPITAL MARKETS.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">The global economy is currently in a pronounced economic downturn. Global financial markets are continuing to experience&#160; disruptions,&#160; including severely diminished liquidity and credit&#160; availability,&#160; declines in consumer confidence, declines in economic&#160; growth,&#160; increases in unemployment&#160; rates, and uncertainty about economic stability. Given these uncertainties,&#160; there is no assurance that there&#160; will not be&#160; further&#160; deterioration in the&#160; global&#160; economy,&#160; the global financial markets and consumer&#160; confidence. We are unable to predict the likely duration and severity of the current global economic&#160; downturn or disruptions in the financial markets. If economic conditions&#160; deteriorate further, our business and results of operations could be materially and adversely affected.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: left; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="BACKGROUND-COLOR: #ffffff; DISPLAY: inline">IF WE FAIL TO&#160; EVALUATE, IMPLEMENT AND INTEGRATE STRATEGIC OPPORTUNITIES SUCCESSFULLY, OUR BUSINESS MAY SUFFER.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt">From&#160; time&#160; to&#160; time,&#160; we&#160; evaluate&#160; strategic&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; opportunities&#160; available&#160; to&#160; us&#160; for product, technology or business acquisitions. If we choose to make acquisitions, we face&#160; certain&#160; risks,&#160; such as failure of the&#160; acquired&#160; business to meet our performance&#160; expectations,&#160; diversion&#160; of management attention,&#160; retention&#160; of existing&#160; customers of our current and acquired&#160; businesses,&#160; and&#160; difficulty in integrating&#160; the acquired&#160; business's&#160; operations,&#160; personnel&#160; and financial and operating systems into our current business.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt">We&#160; may&#160; not&#160; be&#160; able&#160; to&#160; adequately address&#160; these&#160; risks&#160; or&#160; any&#160; other&#160; problems that arise from any future&#160; acquisitions.&#160; Any failure to successfully&#160; evaluate strategic&#160; opportunities&#160; and address risks or other problems that arise related to any acquisition could adversely affect our business, results of operations or financial condition.<br>
</font></font>

<div><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160; </font></div>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-WEIGHT: bold"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">WE&#160;FACE&#160;SIGNIFICANT&#160;CHALLENGES&#160;MANAGING&#160;OUR&#160;GROWTH.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: Times New Roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt">We&#160; will transform our business&#160; to&#160; support&#160; a&#160; global components and&#160; LED lighting&#160; product customer base. In order to manage our growth and change in our strategy&#160; effectively,&#160; we must continue to:</font> </font>

<div><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160; </font><br>
</div>
</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;maintain<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>or<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>contract<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>for<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>adequate<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>manufacturing&#160;facilities<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font>and </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">equipment<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>meet<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>customer<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>demand;</font></font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;maintain<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>a<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>sufficient<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>supply<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>raw<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>materials<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>to<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>support<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>our<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>growth;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;expand<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>research<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>development,<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>sales<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>marketing,<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;</font>technical </font><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">support,<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>distribution<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>capabilities<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>administrative<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>functions;</font></font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;expand<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>the<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>skills<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>capabilities<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>of<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>our<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>current<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>management<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>team;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;add<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>experienced<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>senior<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>level<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>managers;<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>and</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">*&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;attract<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>and<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>retain<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>qualified<font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;&#160;</font>employees.</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 0pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt">&#160;</div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">While&#160; we&#160; intend&#160; to&#160; focus&#160; on managing our&#160; costs&#160; and expenses during the extremely&#160; challenging&#160; economic&#160; environment,&#160; over the long term, we expect to invest&#160; substantially&#160; to support our growth and may have additional&#160; unexpected costs. We may not be able to expand quickly enough to exploit&#160; potential&#160; market opportunities.<br>
</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt"><font style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt">In&#160; connection&#160; with&#160; our&#160; efforts&#160; to cost-effectively manage our growth, we will initially produce our products overseas and will rely on subcontractors for production&#160; capacity,&#160; logistics support and certain&#160; administrative&#160; functions, such&#160; as&#160; payroll&#160; processing.&#160;&#160; If&#160; these&#160; service&#160; providers&#160; do&#160; not&#160; perform effectively,&#160; we may not be able to achieve the&#160; expected&#160; cost&#160; savings and may incur additional&#160; costs to correct errors or fulfill customer demand.&#160; Depending on the&#160; function&#160; involved,&#160; such errors may also lead to&#160; business&#160; disruption, processing&#160; inefficiencies&#160; or the loss of or&#160; damage to&#160; intellectual&#160; property through security breach,&#160; or impact employee morale.&#160; Our operations may also be negatively&#160; impacted if any of these service providers do not have the financial capability to withstand the continuing financial downturn.</font></font></div>

<div style="TEXT-ALIGN: justify; TEXT-INDENT: 36pt; DISPLAY: block; MARGIN-LEFT: 0pt; MARGIN-RIGHT: 0pt"><font style="DISPLAY: inline; FONT-FAMILY: times new roman; FONT-SIZE: 10pt">&#160;</font></div>
